debug_info.goal:
r : ℝ
hr : r ≥ 0
⊢ HasFiniteIntegral (Φ₅ r) (volume.restrict (Ioc 0 1))

failed_attempts:
have : IntegrableOn (Φ₅ r) (Icc 0 1) volume := Φ₅_contDiffOn.continuousOn.integrableOn_Icc
  exact this.hasFiniteIntegral.mono_measure (Measure.restrict_mono Ioc_subset_Icc_self le_rfl)

have h1 : Ioc (0 : ℝ) 1 ⊆ Icc 0 1 := Ioc_subset_Icc_self
  have hcpt : IsCompact (Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) := isCompact_Icc
  have hcont : ContinuousOn (Φ₅ r) (Icc 0 1) := Φ₅_contDiffOn.continuousOn
  obtain ⟨C, hC⟩ := hcpt.exists_bound_of_continuousOn hcont
  apply HasFiniteIntegral.mono' (g := fun _ => C)
  · exact hasFiniteIntegral_const C
  · exact ae_of_all _ (fun x hx => hC x (h1 hx))

have h : IntegrableOn (Φ₅ r) (Icc 0 1) volume := 
    Φ₅_contDiffOn.continuousOn.integrableOn_compact isCompact_Icc
  exact h.hasFiniteIntegral.mono_measure (Measure.restrict_mono Ioc_subset_Icc_self le_rfl)

have h := Φ₅_contDiffOn.continuousOn
  have hbdd : BddAbove ((fun x => ‖Φ₅ r x‖) '' Icc 0 1) := by
    apply IsCompact.bddAbove_image isCompact_Icc
    exact (Φ₅_contDiffOn.continuousOn.mono Icc_subset_Icc_self).norm
  obtain ⟨M, hM⟩ := hbdd
  refine HasFiniteIntegral.mono' ?_ (ae_of_all _ fun x hx => hM ⟨x, Ioc_subset_Icc_self hx, rfl⟩)
  exact (integrableOn_const.mpr (Or.inr measure_Ioc_lt_top)).hasFiniteIntegral

have h1 : Ioc (0 : ℝ) 1 ⊆ Icc 0 1 := Ioc_subset_Icc_self
  have h2 : IsCompact (Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) := isCompact_Icc
  have h3 : ContinuousOn (Φ₅ r) (Icc 0 1) := Φ₅_contDiffOn.continuousOn
  obtain ⟨C, hC⟩ := h2.exists_bound_of_continuousOn h3
  refine HasFiniteIntegral.mono' ?_ (ae_of_all _ (fun x hx => hC x (h1 hx)))
  exact hasFiniteIntegral_const (μ := volume.restrict (Ioc 0 1))

apply HasFiniteIntegral.mono_measure
  · exact (Φ₅_contDiffOn.continuousOn.integrableOn_compact isCompact_Icc).hasFiniteIntegral
  · exact Measure.restrict_mono Ioc_subset_Icc_self le_rfl

apply HasFiniteIntegral.mono_measure
  · exact (Φ₅_contDiffOn.continuousOn.integrableOn_compact isCompact_Icc).hasFiniteIntegral
  · exact Measure.restrict_mono Ioc_subset_Icc_self le_rfl

have h := Φ₅_contDiffOn.continuousOn.integrableOn_compact isCompact_Icc
  exact (h.mono Ioc_subset_Icc_self le_rfl).hasFiniteIntegral
